title: 伊瑟异能英雄养成小贴士①
summary: 伊瑟游玩技巧小贴士①亲爱的超链者，这里由协会为大家分享几个养成小贴士。小贴士偏新人向~为新的超链者保驾护航~~1：前期升级体力分配的建议，以及双倍掉落活动的体力分配建议。首先先跟着系统引导完成对应战斗，重点来了（咳咳，记笔记哈）！那就是当超链者主线过完2-3之后，会开启“超链之证”，跟着里面的任务引

，"},{"text":"跟着里面的任务引导去做哦，奖励丰富。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"如图所示，“超链之证”的位置图标。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3CzzCP5Xh4Z4pbyh","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1200/50364/789037/2025/7/30/95007.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"当超链者随着等级不断提升遇到要求等级开启的时候，不要慌，接下来你可以这样做。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"去打-------------","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“凶影追缉”“熔断禁区”“秘闻调查”“源点前哨”","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"它们分别对应","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“智壳副本”“源器副本”“异格者等级经验书”“技能等级材料”","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"Mdr4JSFazntVLyz7","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_554/h_181/50364/789037/2025/7/30/487640.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"以上四个日常挑战副本首通都有奖励哦。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"KUDtw4ccizleFSHc","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_554/h_261/50364/789037/2025/7/30/776556.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"智壳升级会有属性提升，同理异格者升级也会有属性提升。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ZitckkO3OA8b9ZL3","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1200/50364/789037/2025/7/30/619903.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"潜能（技能等级）升级，不仅会获得属性加成，还可以提升技能等级。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"建议：受限于前期资源紧张，三个技能的潜能最好都要升级到","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"color":"rgb(255, 0, 0)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":"","text":"LV2"},{"color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":"","text":"之前。攻击/攻击百分比，防御/防御百分比，生命/生命百分百，都可以增加很多属性值。后续再提升等级技能就可以啦~~~"}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"S53jSdGZLc6aGv3c","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_553/h_312/50364/789037/2025/7/30/915965.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"header3","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"双倍掉落活动建议","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"只有","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“熔断禁区”“秘闻调查”“源点前哨”","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"这三个是参加双倍掉落的哦","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"前期建议刷取“异格者等级经验书--会概率掉落","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"海德拉晶钻&异格原型抽卡卷","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"”和“技能等级材料”因为稳赚不赔哈。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"中后期刷“熔断禁区”的双倍源器掉落，享受飞一般的感觉~~~","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header2","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"2：R卡资源获取指南。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"R卡的养成比SR/SSR低了很多，需要的材料也会少很多。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"这就不得不提伊瑟的","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“恶命”","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"大人，超爱打架的地下帮派打手。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"我只能说官方设计的","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“恶命”","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"真的是一张神卡！","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"科研","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"“恶命”","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"的玩家我真的很佩服！！很佩服！！很佩服！！重要的事情说三遍。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"升级等级&技能等级同上，重点是升级技能等级的一个材料。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"如图","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"NbZ1JQQCkwdTne6T","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1800/h_2500/50364/789037/2025/7/30/686520.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"召唤商店&竞技商店的积分都是很好获得的，每次刷新时间结束之前可以分别","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"color":"rgb(225, 60, 57)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":"买满"},{"text":"5","color":"rgb(225, 60, 57)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":"次。","color":"rgb(225, 60, 57)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"无需考虑---买!!!  全测玩家告诉你：“恶命”是每人必练的一张卡。","color":"rgb(225, 60, 57)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header2","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"3：伊瑟币怎么花。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"x05CwSRcdcVdS3dC","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_620/h_319/50364/789037/2025/7/30/350212.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"伊瑟币获取方式：","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"副本掉落&任务奖励&商店和活动奖励兑换。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"主要用来强化升级源器（前期伊瑟币紧张的话，源器可以先强化到9级够用就可以了，因为强化的等级越高，需要消耗的伊瑟币越多）","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header2","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"4：智壳养成币怎么花。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"jXpkJyzGCPcFPR9Y","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_648/h_257/50364/789037/2025/7/30/834973.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"智壳币获取方式：凶影追缉&任务奖励&商店和活动奖励兑换。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"主要用于升级智壳等级和重构智壳","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"这里重点说一下重构：分别升级突破至10级/20级/30级，会分别解锁被动一/被动二/被动三。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"当你迷茫不知道刷什么的时候，可以选择刷","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"智壳副本。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""},{"text":" 因为可以实打实的提升噢。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"但是重构前期不建议多次点击，给啥用啥，可以适当的点几下，以节约资源为主。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"NrgtLFPk2hfZ145h","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_554/h_297/50364/789037/2025/7/30/648135.png","alt":"","style":{},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"结语","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"以上就是本篇的全部内容啦。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"预祝各位超链者国服欧气满满，游戏愉快~","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"感谢阅读。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"韶华","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]}]
